prompt.name: Gym CRM SaaS
prompt.prompt: Build a CRM SaaS platform for gym owners. We're losing too many members — they join but stop coming after 2 months. I need member management, attendance tracking, lead pipeline, billing automation, and a dashboard showing retention metrics.

agents.output: {"scope":"Iron Peak Fitness — a Gym CRM SaaS built for Gym owners, staff, and members. Core features include Member management with profiles, Attendance tracking and check-in, Billing and invoice generation.","features":["Member management with profiles","Attendance tracking and check-in","Billing and invoice generation","Lead pipeline and conversion","Class scheduling and booking"],"audience":"Gym owners, staff, and members","successCriteria":"Functional gym-crm application with realistic data, responsive design, and all core workflows operational"}

{"components":[{"name":"MemberManagement","purpose":"Member list with search, filter, and CRUD operations","children":["MemberTable","MemberSearch","MemberForm"]},{"name":"AttendanceTracking","purpose":"Check-in system with calendar view and statistics","children":["AttendanceCalendar","AttendanceTable","CheckInButton"]},{"name":"BillingDashboard","purpose":"Invoice management with payment tracking","children":["InvoiceTable","PaymentForm","PlanSelector"]}],"stateManagement":"React hooks (useState, useEffect, useMemo) with domain-specific data providers","interactions":["Check-in members, filter attendance, manage billing"]}
{"issues":[],"missingBestPractices":["Attendance check-in race conditions","Invoice PDF generation","Role-based access control","Data export for reporting"],"qualityScore":82}

insights.scope: Iron Peak Fitness — a Gym CRM SaaS built for Gym owners, staff, and members. Core features include Member management with profiles, Attendance tracking and check-in, Billing and invoice generation.

components.name: AttendanceCalendar
components.description: Interactive calendar showing attendance per day with color-coded status, month navigation, and member filter

components.name: AttendanceTable
components.description: Tabular view of attendance records with search, filter by date/member, and status indicators

components.name: MemberTable
components.description: Member list with search, status badges, membership type, and action buttons

components.name: InvoiceTable
components.description: Invoice list with payment status, amounts, due dates, and filter by status

components.name: LeadPipeline
components.description: Kanban-style lead pipeline with drag stages, lead cards with value and probability

components.name: RevenueChart
components.description: Revenue over time chart with period selector (weekly/monthly/yearly)

components.name: ClassSchedule
components.description: Weekly class schedule with time slots, instructor info, capacity, and booking

prompt.name: Supplement Ecommerce Store
prompt.prompt: Build an ecommerce store for a supplement brand. We sell whey protein, creatine, pre-workout, and vitamins. Need product catalog, cart, checkout, order tracking, customer accounts, and an admin dashboard with sales analytics.

agents.output: {"scope":"FitLife Supplements — a Ecommerce Store built for Fitness enthusiasts and athletes looking for premium supplements. Core features include Product catalog with search and filters, Shopping cart and checkout flow, Order history and tracking.","features":["Product catalog with search and filters","Shopping cart and checkout flow","Order history and tracking","Customer reviews and ratings","Admin inventory management"],"audience":"Fitness enthusiasts and athletes looking for premium supplements","successCriteria":"Functional ecommerce application with realistic data, responsive design, and all core workflows operational"}

{"components":[{"name":"ProductGrid","purpose":"Responsive product listing with images, prices, and add-to-cart","children":["ProductCard","FilterSidebar","SortDropdown"]},{"name":"CartCheckout","purpose":"Shopping cart with quantity controls and checkout flow","children":["CartItems","CartSummary","PaymentForm"]},{"name":"AccountDashboard","purpose":"Customer account with order history and profile","children":["OrderHistory","ProfileForm","WishlistGrid"]}],"stateManagement":"React hooks (useState, useEffect, useMemo) with domain-specific data providers","interactions":["Add to cart, filter products, checkout"]}
{"issues":[],"missingBestPractices":["Cart state persistence across page reloads","Payment form input validation","Mobile responsive product grid","Image loading optimization"],"qualityScore":82}

insights.scope: FitLife Supplements — a Ecommerce Store built for Fitness enthusiasts and athletes looking for premium supplements. Core features include Product catalog with search and filters, Shopping cart and checkout flow, Order history and tracking.

prompt.name: Restaurant Management
prompt.prompt: Build a restaurant management system. We need online ordering, table reservations, menu management, kitchen order display, staff scheduling, and a dashboard showing daily revenue and popular dishes.

agents.output: {"scope":"Sakura Japanese Bistro — a Restaurant / Food Service built for Diners looking for authentic Japanese cuisine. Core features include Online menu with categories, Table reservation system, Order management dashboard.","features":["Online menu with categories","Table reservation system","Order management dashboard","Customer reviews and ratings","Kitchen display system"],"audience":"Diners looking for authentic Japanese cuisine","successCriteria":"Functional restaurant application with realistic data, responsive design, and all core workflows operational"}

{"components":[{"name":"MenuDisplay","purpose":"Menu with categories, images, and dietary info","children":["MenuGrid","MenuItem","CategoryFilter"]},{"name":"ReservationSystem","purpose":"Table booking with date/time selection","children":["ReservationForm","TimeSlotPicker","GuestCount"]},{"name":"OrderManagement","purpose":"Kitchen orders with status tracking","children":["OrderQueue","OrderCard","StatusUpdater"]}],"stateManagement":"React hooks (useState, useEffect, useMemo) with domain-specific data providers","interactions":["Browse menu, make reservation, track orders"]}
{"issues":[],"missingBestPractices":["Reservation time slot conflicts","Menu item availability updates","Order status real-time sync","Table capacity validation"],"qualityScore":82}
